text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers later. Force 3 to 4 southwesterly winds.
